project_type: TypeScript monorepo - 19 Next.js apps, 105+ shared packages, 8 infrastructure services
build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 workspaces + Turborepo 2. Tasks: typecheck, lint, test, build. All run via turbo.
test_framework: Vitest 4 with vitest.config.ts at root. Tests in __tests__/ dirs or *.test.ts files.
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm turbo typecheck (152 packages must pass). 2. pnpm turbo lint. 3. pnpm turbo test. 4. pnpm turbo build.
snapshot_or_generated_files: packages/database generates @prisma/client via 'prisma generate --schema=prisma/schema.prisma'. dist/ folders contain tsc output but are gitignored.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (already done). No external services needed for typecheck/lint/test - tests use mocks.
environment_constraints: Open internet. No AWS credentials. No running PostgreSQL/Redis/Kafka. Tests must work without external services. LiveKit/Triton/Meilisearch are external - wrap with proper clients that gracefully handle missing connections.
contribution_requirements: Commit messages follow conventional commits. CI runs typecheck+lint+test on affected packages. All code must pass existing gate: typecheck, lint, test, build.
key_patterns: Backend: Fastify 5 via @quant/server-core createApp(). Services: Zod validation, pino logging. AI: Vercel AI SDK (ai package) with real providers. Storage: @aws-sdk/client-s3. Real-time: ws + ioredis + nats. Agent tools: ToolRegistry pattern with execute() functions.
directory_structure: apps/ - 19 frontend apps (Next.js 15). packages/ - 105+ shared libraries. services/ - 8 infrastructure services. infra/ - Terraform/Helm/K8s. e2e/ - Playwright tests. scripts/ - tooling.
